notes: Rust-based cross-platform conda/PyPI package & environment manager from prefix.dev (rising 2025-2026 Python/data-science workflow tool). Reads as the English word "pixie" — STRESS first syllable: PIK-see, rhymes with "fixie." Not "pix-eye." No official creator pronunciation quote located; based on the unambiguous English reading of the spelling. CLI invoked lowercase as `pixi`.
